introduction: An altar dedicated to the Void Prince stands before you, still active with malevolent energy. Unlike the defiled altar on Level 3, this one was built by the cult from the ground up.
Fresh offerings cover the surface: bowls of blood, bone fragments arranged in geometric patterns, and crystals that pulse with sickly purple light.
A ceremonial dagger lies on the altar, its blade stained black. Behind the altar, a tapestry depicts the Void Prince - a massive, impossible form of writhing darkness and too many eyes.
You examine the offerings more closely, fighting down revulsion:
The blood is fresh - offered within the last few hours. The bones have been carved with void runes that seem to shift when you're not looking directly at them.
The crystals are the most disturbing. They pulse in rhythm with... something. You realize with horror that it's a heartbeat - but not any heartbeat you recognize. It's too slow, too deep, too vast.
You're hearing the Void Prince's heartbeat. It's already partially manifested.
You force yourself to study the tapestry depicting the Void Prince. Your mind rebels against the image, but you push through the discomfort.

The being shown is impossibly large - a titan of living darkness that dwarfs mountains. Its form is constantly shifting: tentacles, wings, claws, mouths. Eyes open and close across its surface like stars being born and dying.
Below the image, embroidered text in an ancient language. You can somehow read it:
'HE WHO DEVOURS LIGHT. HE WHO ENDS ALL THINGS. THE PRINCE OF THE ETERNAL VOID. SPEAK HIS TRUE NAME AND BE CONSUMED. SERVE HIM AND BE REMADE.'
Your head throbs. You look away before the image burns itself permanently into your mind.
You grab the ceremonial dagger and slash at the tapestry, then sweep the offerings from the altar. The crystals shatter, their eerie heartbeat ceasing.
For a moment, you feel a surge of satisfaction - then the shrine flares with dark energy. The void runes carved into the altar ignite with purple fire.

A psychic scream tears through your mind. The Void Prince NOTICED you. For one terrible instant, you feel its attention focus on you across the dimensional barrier - an intelligence so vast and alien that your mind nearly breaks under its regard.
Then the feeling passes. The shrine goes dark, desecrated. But you know you've been marked. IT knows you're here now.
